docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SONAIKE, DEDUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DEDUN SONAIKE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MONIQUE CHAUVET VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-21-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DUE TO UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR DEC-21-2021 TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM REQUEST TO THE COURT (SUBMISSION MUST BE RECEIVED AT THE COURTHOUSE TEN DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE). PLAINTIFF DEDUN SONAIKE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM . DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY MONIQUE CHAUVET (EMPLOYEE). DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SONAIKE, DEDUN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY DROP BOX FROM DEFENDANT
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONAIKE, DEDUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $941.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (MONIQUE CHAUVET APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT - AIRBNB, INC.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED OCT-08-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING DATE: NOV-23-21 AT 10:00 AM)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE:

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2021 - JUDGMENT.
